title: eda-agents bench task
description: One benchmark task for the eda-agents Pass@1 harness. Inspired by behavioral-veriloga-eval/schemas/task.schema.json (no LICENSE upstream — re-authored from scratch).

id.description: Stable identifier, snake_case. Should embed PDK + family + circuit when ambiguous (e.g. miller_ota_spec_to_sizing_ihp).

category.description: Free-form circuit class (ota, comparator, sar_adc, digital_systolic, etc).

pdk.description: Active PDK or null for PDK-agnostic tasks (e.g. pure digital RTL).

harness.description: Which harness adapter executes the task. dry_run is a fixed-output mock for pipeline smoke testing.

topology.description: Optional topology identifier consumed by the harness adapter (e.g. miller_ota, sar_adc_8bit).

inputs.description: Free-form harness inputs (spec dict, broken netlist, parameter overrides...).

must_include.description: Regex patterns that MUST match somewhere in the produced artifact set.

must_not_include.description: Regex patterns that MUST NOT match the produced artifacts.

expected_metrics.description: Per-metric thresholds. Keys are metric names, values are objects with optional min / max numeric bounds.
